nodes.label: Solana Crowdfunding Program
nodes.description: Anchor Rust program for crowdfunding smart contract

nodes.label: Campaign Account
nodes.description: Data structure for crowdfunding campaign with owner, name, target amount, current amount

nodes.label: Create Campaign
nodes.description: Create campaign with title, description, image_url, goal

nodes.label: Donate
nodes.description: Transfer SOL to campaign, min 1 SOL, creates transaction record

nodes.label: Withdraw
nodes.description: Creator withdraws, 5% platform fee, min 1 SOL

nodes.label: Phantom Wallet Connection
nodes.description: Connect user Phantom wallet to Next.js frontend using @solana/wallet-adapter

nodes.label: AnchorProvider
nodes.description: Bridge between frontend and Anchor program for transactions

nodes.label: Program Interface
nodes.description: TypeScript class wrapping IDL to interact with Solana program

nodes.label: IDL.json
nodes.description: Interface Definition Language file from Anchor build - describes program structure

nodes.label: Connect Wallet Flow
nodes.description: User connects Phantom wallet → app detects wallet → enables interactions

nodes.label: Create Campaign Flow
nodes.description: User fills form → calls create instruction → campaign created on chain

nodes.label: Fund Project Flow
nodes.description: User clicks donate → signs transaction → SOL transferred to campaign PDA

nodes.label: Withdraw Flow
nodes.description: Owner claims funds → SOL withdrawn to wallet if goal reached

nodes.label: Solana Devnet Setup
nodes.description: solana config set --url devnet, airdrop SOL for testing

nodes.label: Anchor Deploy
nodes.description: anchor build && anchor deploy - deploys program to devnet

nodes.label: Fundus Program
nodes.description: Solana Anchor crowdfunding program

nodes.label: Campaign State
nodes.description: Data structure: cid, creator, title, description, image_url, goal, amount_raised, balance, active

nodes.label: Program State
nodes.description: Global state: campaign_count, platform_fee (5%), platform_address

nodes.label: Initialize
nodes.description: One-time program initialization

nodes.label: Update Campaign
nodes.description: Update campaign details

nodes.label: Delete Campaign
nodes.description: Delete campaign

nodes.label: Campaign PDA
nodes.description: seeds=[b"campaign", cid.to_le_bytes()]

nodes.label: Donor Transaction PDA
nodes.description: seeds=[b"donor", donor.key(), cid, donor_count]

nodes.label: Withdraw Transaction PDA
nodes.description: seeds=[b"withdraw", creator.key(), cid, withdraw_count]

nodes.label: Campaign Listing
nodes.description: Display all campaigns with progress bars

nodes.label: Create Campaign Form
nodes.description: Form to create new campaign

nodes.label: Donation Flow
nodes.description: Connect wallet, enter amount, confirm transaction

nodes.label: Withdrawal Flow
nodes.description: Creator withdraws raised funds after goal met

nodes.label: Min Goal Validation
nodes.description: Minimum 1 SOL (1B lamports) for campaign goal

nodes.label: Min Donation Validation
nodes.description: Minimum 1 SOL per donation

nodes.label: Platform Fee
nodes.description: 5% fee on withdrawals goes to platform_address

nodes.label: Creator-Only Withdrawal
nodes.description: Only campaign creator can withdraw

nodes.label: Wallet Adapter Replacement
nodes.description: Replace @solana/wallet-adapter with @solana/kit + wallet-standard

nodes.label: IDL Client Replacement
nodes.description: Replace manual IDL with Codama-generated client
